franky  1.1.4
A High-Level Motion API for Franka
  • include
  • franky
util.hpp
Go to the documentation of this file.
1 #pragma once
2 
3 #include <franka/duration.h>
4 
5 #include <Eigen/Core>
6 #include <array>
7 
8 namespace franky {
9 
10 template <typename T, size_t dims>
11 std::array<T, dims> toStd(const Eigen::Matrix<T, dims, 1> &vector) {
12  std::array<T, dims> result;
13  Eigen::Matrix<T, dims, 1>::Map(result.data()) = vector;
14  return result;
15 }
16 
17 template <size_t dims>
18 std::array<double, dims> toStdD(const Eigen::Matrix<double, dims, 1> &vector) {
19  return toStd<double, dims>(vector);
20 }
21 
22 template <typename T, size_t dims>
23 Eigen::Matrix<T, dims, 1> toEigen(const std::array<T, dims> &vector) {
24  return Eigen::Matrix<T, dims, 1>::Map(vector.data());
25 }
26 
27 template <size_t dims>
28 Eigen::Matrix<double, dims, 1> toEigenD(const std::array<double, dims> &vector) {
29  return toEigen<double, dims>(vector);
30 }
31 
32 template <size_t rows, size_t cols>
33 std::array<double, rows * cols> toStdDMatD(const Eigen::Matrix<double, rows, cols, Eigen::ColMajor> &matrix) {
34  std::array<double, rows * cols> result;
35  Eigen::Map<Eigen::Matrix<double, rows, cols, Eigen::ColMajor>>(result.data()) = matrix;
36  return result;
37 }
38 
39 template <size_t rows, size_t cols>
40 Eigen::Matrix<double, rows, cols, Eigen::ColMajor> toEigenMatD(const std::array<double, rows * cols> &array) {
41  return Eigen::Map<const Eigen::Matrix<double, rows, cols, Eigen::ColMajor>>(array.data());
42 }
43 
44 inline Affine stdToAffine(const std::array<double, 16> &array) {
45  Affine result;
46  result.matrix() = toEigenMatD<4, 4>(array);
47  return result;
48 }
49 
50 template <size_t dims>
51 Eigen::Vector<double, dims> ensureEigen(const Array<dims> &input) {
52  if (std::holds_alternative<Eigen::Vector<double, dims>>(input)) return std::get<Eigen::Vector<double, dims>>(input);
53  return toEigenD<dims>(std::get<std::array<double, dims>>(input));
54 }
55 
56 template <size_t dims>
57 std::array<double, dims> ensureStd(const Array<dims> &input) {
58  if (std::holds_alternative<std::array<double, dims>>(input)) return std::get<std::array<double, dims>>(input);
59  return toStdD<dims>(std::get<Eigen::Vector<double, dims>>(input));
60 }
61 
62 template <size_t dims>
63 std::array<double, dims> expand(const ScalarOrArray<dims> &input) {
64  if (std::holds_alternative<Array<dims>>(input)) {
65  return ensureStd<dims>(std::get<Array<dims>>(input));
66  }
67  std::array<double, dims> output;
68  std::fill(output.begin(), output.end(), std::get<double>(input));
69  return output;
70 }
71 
72 template <size_t dims>
73 Eigen::Vector<double, dims> expandEigen(const ScalarOrArray<dims> &input) {
74  if (std::holds_alternative<Array<dims>>(input)) {
75  return ensureEigen<dims>(std::get<Array<dims>>(input));
76  }
77  Eigen::Vector<double, dims> output;
78  output.fill(std::get<double>(input));
79  return output;
80 }
81 
82 template <int dims>
83 std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Eigen::Vector<double, dims> &vec) {
84  os << "[";
85  for (size_t i = 0; i < dims; i++) {
86  os << vec[i];
87  if (i != dims - 1) os << " ";
88  }
89  os << "]";
90  return os;
91 }
92 
93 inline std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Affine &affine) {
94  os << "Affine(t=" << affine.translation().eval() << ", q=" << Eigen::Quaterniond(affine.rotation()).coeffs() << ")";
95  return os;
96 }
97 
98 inline std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const franka::Duration &duration) {
99  os << "Duration(" << duration.toMSec() << ")";
100  return os;
101 }
102 
103 } // namespace franky
